name: Envictus International Holdings Limited
summary: Envictus International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides various food and beverage products in Malaysia, New Zealand, Australia, China, rest of ASEAN countries, the Middle East, Africa, and internationally. The company's Food Services division develops and operates Texas Chicken restaurants, and San Francisco Coffee chains in Malaysia. The company's Trading and Frozen Food division imports and distributes food products in raw and processed form for the hospitality and consumer-based food industries. Its products include frozen/chilled meats, dairy products, seafood, condiments, and others. Its Food Processing division manufactures and sells frozen bakery products, such as croissants, bread loaves, baguettes, burger buns, sweet pastries, savoury pastries, pizza, muffins, bagels, and pretzels for the hotel, retail, entertainment, convenience store, airline, and catering industries under the Hearty Bake brand name. This division also offers cold cuts, sausages, portion control meat, and smoked salmon for supermarkets, hotels, and restaurants. The company's Dairies division distributes condensed and evaporated milk. It also engages in the provision of IT and management services; property investment activities; and sale of restaurant and caf√É¬© vouchers. The company was formerly known as Etika International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Envictus International Holdings Limited in July 2014. Envictus International Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is based in Singapore.
